Forward model¶

This module may be employed to calculate the forward model for the source reconstruction.

source_reconstruction.forward_model.calc_forward_model(lh_geom_white_vert, rh_geom_white_vert, head_to_mri_trans, mri_to_head_trans, rec_meta_info, bem_trans_ws_in_skull_vert, bem_ws_in_skull_faces, bem_ws_in_skull_faces_normal, bem_ws_in_skull_faces_area, bem_solution, valid_lh_geom_vert, valid_rh_geom_vert, _mag_factor=1e-07)¶

Calculates the forward model according to Mosher et al, 1999.

Parameters:

  • lh_geom_white_vert – Lh white matter surface (MRI).

  • rh_geom_white_vert – Rh white matter surface (MRI).

  • head_to_mri_trans – Head to MRI transformation.

  • mri_to_head_trans – MRI to head transformation.

  • rec_meta_info – MEG recording meta info.

  • bem_trans_ws_in_skull_vert – Inner skull model vertices.

  • bem_ws_in_skull_faces – Inner skull model faces.

  • bem_ws_in_skull_faces_normal – Inner skull model faces’ normals.

  • bem_ws_in_skull_faces_area – Inner skull model faces’ areas.

  • bem_solution – BEM linear basis functions.

  • valid_lh_geom_vert – Binary list of Freesurfer lh vertices that have a match in the model vertices (octahedron).

  • valid_rh_geom_vert – Binary list of Freesurfer rh vertices that have a match in the model vertices (octahedron).

Returns:

Forward model and checked vertices (lh & rh) for being within the skull.

source_reconstruction.forward_model._get_meg_coil_positions(rec_meta_info, head_to_mri_trans)¶
source_reconstruction.forward_model._apply_coreg_to_vertices(geom_white_vert, coreg_trans_mat)¶
source_reconstruction.forward_model._update_invalid_vertices(approx_surface, geom_white_vert, valid_geom_vert)¶
source_reconstruction.forward_model._calc_magnetic_fields(white_vertices_mri, bem_trans_ws_in_skull_vert, coreg_trans_mat, pre_fwd_solution)¶

Computes infinite medium potentials.

Parameters:

  • white_vertices_mri – White matter vertices.

  • bem_trans_ws_in_skull_vert – Inner skull model vertices.

  • coreg_trans_mat – Transformatio matrix from the coregistration.

  • pre_fwd_solution – Fwd solution precursor.

Returns:

Forward solution with infinite medium potentials.

source_reconstruction.forward_model._add_current_distribution(fwd_sol, white_vertices, meg_ch_infos, rmags, cosmags, ws, meg_ch_indices)¶

Adds current distribution to the MEG forward solution.

Parameters:

  • fwd_sol – Previously calcualted forward solution.

  • white_vertices – White matter vertices.

  • meg_ch_infos – MEG recording meta into.

  • rmags – 3D positions of MEG coil integration points (MEG space).

  • cosmags – Direction of the MEG coil integration points (MEG space).

  • ws – Weights for MEG coil integration points.

  • meg_ch_indices – Indices of MEG channels.

Returns:

Forward solution updated for primary currend distributions.

previous

Coregistration (MEG to MRI)
